statement: In every magma, Equation 3413 (`x * y = z * (z * (x * x))`) implies Equation 3812 (`x * y = (z * y) * (z * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0686
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op z (op z (op x x)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op z y) (op z z))
